purpose: Machine-readable control plane describing every (visa_status, procedure, scenario) row that Paradiso AI is expected to answer about, and the deterministic answer path that exists today (or does not yet exist).
scope_notes: This file is metadata. It is not read by /api/ask. Modifying a row never changes production answer behavior on its own.
Active grounding still lives only in backend/data/manual_grounding/stay_manual_grounding_2026_05.json. This matrix only records that fact; it does not add or remove grounding.
candidate_ref fields are declarative pointers under backend/data/manual_grounding/candidates/. The candidate validator and the active grounding selector are unchanged.

Rows with source_status=source_needed/law_api_needed/notice_needed mean: a human reviewer must locate a primary source before any grounding work begins; no LLM-generated answer is acceptable in their place.
page_range / sub_codes_covered / scenarios_covered are intentionally omitted from rows that do not yet have a verified source; the matrix must not fabricate page numbers.

rows.notes: Active grounding entry shipped via PR A. Source: stay_manual_2026_05.pdf pp.43-44.
rows.next_action: Hold. Re-verify if 2026-05 manual is superseded.

rows.notes: Covers D-4-1 and D-4-7 language-trainee sub-track only. D-4-2K, D-4-3, D-4-5, D-4-6 are explicitly NOT covered.
rows.next_action: Add separate rows / future candidates for D-4-2K, D-4-3, D-4-5, D-4-6 when source pages are verified.

rows.notes: Covers the general E-7 extension document list (manual p.226). Agreement-based special tracks (한·인도 CEPA, 한·러, 외국법자문법률사무소) and E-7-4 숙련기능인력 are NOT covered.
rows.next_action: Add separate rows for E-7-4 and treaty-based sub-tracks when verified.

rows.notes: Draft candidate from PR #59. NOT active. Per-scenario routing (사망/실종/이혼/별거/자녀양육) is required before any promotion.
rows.next_action: Do not promote. Wait for Korean immigration domain reviewer plus per-scenario row split.

rows.notes: Manual references 별거·이혼소송·배우자 실종 중 체류기간 연장 at stay_manual_2026_05.pdf p.495 (per F-6 candidate verification_note). No active candidate file exists yet. Until a verified candidate is committed, requests should be routed to the scoped fallback that tells the user to consult 관할 출입국·외국인청 and a qualified expert.
rows.next_action: Create a verified candidate at backend/data/manual_grounding/candidates/f6_1_divorce_litigation/ referencing p.495, then review.

rows.visa_name_en: Marriage migrant — raising a Korean child
rows.notes: Manual references 자녀양육자 체류기간 연장 및 면접교섭권 특칙 at stay_manual_2026_05.pdf p.496 (per F-6 candidate verification_note). No candidate file exists. Custody/visitation rules differ from generic F-6-3 divorce flow; do not collapse into the same answer.
rows.next_action: Create a verified candidate at backend/data/manual_grounding/candidates/f6_2_child_raising/ referencing p.496, then review.

rows.notes: The PR #59 candidate's primary scope is F-6-3 '국민 배우자와 이혼한 후 최초 체류기간 연장허가' (manual p.498). 사망/실종 first-extension at p.497 is referenced but is a separate scenario and is not covered by the current candidate.
rows.next_action: Hold. Do not promote until per-scenario routing is added and a domain reviewer approves.

rows.notes: Manual references F-1-6 가사정리 체류기간 연장 at stay_manual_2026_05.pdf p.499. 매회 6개월 범위 내, 자격변경일로부터 1년까지, with G-1 transition after one year when litigation continues. No candidate file exists. Easily confused with F-6-3; must remain a separate row.
rows.next_action: Create a verified candidate referencing p.499 and G-1 transition path, then review.

rows.notes: D-10 extension 제출서류 page is not yet verified inside stay_manual_2026_05.pdf. Until verified, _select_grounding will not match D-10 and the answer falls back to the scoped Korean-immigration fallback.
rows.next_action: Locate D-10 체류기간 연장허가 제출서류 page in stay_manual_2026_05.pdf, create candidate, review.

rows.notes: Sub-code D-10-1 (job-seeking) vs D-10-2 (technology entrepreneurship) likely diverge in 제출서류. Keep separate rows; do not auto-generalize.
rows.next_action: Locate D-10-1 page in stay_manual_2026_05.pdf and create candidate.

rows.notes: F-2 has many sub-codes (F-2-1 ~ F-2-99 점수제, F-2-R 지역특화 등) with materially different 제출서류. Do not produce a single 'F-2' answer.
rows.next_action: Enumerate F-2 sub-codes from stay_manual_2026_05.pdf and produce one row per sub-code before any candidate work.

rows.notes: F-5 holders do not extend the visa itself; they renew the 영주증 card on a separate schedule. The /api/ask 'extension' task type is the wrong frame for F-5. Backend has no permanent_residence_card_renewal task type today; route to scoped fallback.
rows.next_action: Decide whether to add a new task_type in a future PR. Until then, scoped fallback only.

rows.notes: Backend detects workplace_change as a task type but no grounding entry exists for any visa. _select_grounding returns None unless task_type=='extension' AND visa is in _GROUNDED_VISA_CODES; workplace_change therefore always falls through to the scoped fallback today.
rows.next_action: Locate E-7 근무처 변경/추가 제출서류 in stay_manual_2026_05.pdf; create candidate.

rows.notes: Backend detects academic_status_change but no grounding entry exists. Leave-of-absence frequently triggers status change rather than extension; answer must not assume continued D-2 eligibility.
rows.next_action: Locate 휴학 관련 D-2 처리 in stay_manual_2026_05.pdf and create candidate.

rows.notes: Post-graduation paths (D-10 transition, E-series transition, departure) differ. Do not let the model invent a single canonical 'what to do after graduation' answer.
rows.next_action: Map graduation/completion outcomes to (D-10, E-series, F-2 점수제) per stay_manual_2026_05.pdf, then create candidates.

rows.notes: Applies to all registered foreign residents. Statutory basis lives in 출입국관리법 / 시행규칙 — must be sourced from law text, not paraphrased.
rows.next_action: Cite 출입국관리법 / 시행규칙 조문; create candidate referencing primary statute.

rows.notes: 시행규칙 제49조의2 변경신고 대상에 여권의 번호·발급일자·유효기간이 포함됨. Must cite source.
rows.next_action: Cite 시행규칙 제49조의2 directly; create candidate.

rows.notes: Backend has no foreigner_registration task type detector today even though _TASK_RISK_LEVELS lists it. _detect_task_type does not return 'foreigner_registration'. Must be addressed before any grounding is added.
rows.next_action: Add 외국인등록 detection signals AND locate primary source; both required.

rows.notes: Change-of-status answers are pair-dependent (from-status → to-status). A single generic answer is unsafe. Backend already detects status_change; the model must not be allowed to invent 제출서류 lists.
rows.next_action: Enumerate the (from, to) pairs we plan to support and create one candidate per pair.

rows.visa_name_en: Common — activity permission outside current status
rows.notes: Status-specific permissioned activity (e.g. D-2 holder doing limited paid work, D-4 holder doing part-time) is heavily rule-bound. No task type exists today.
rows.next_action: Add 체류자격외 활동 detection signals AND cite stay_manual_2026_05.pdf section; both required.
